name: sap-hana-cloud
description: Thin Claude Code wrapper around hana-mcp-server with HANA discovery, reviewed SQL writes, and hana_ml/PAL workflow skills.

host.title: HANA Host
host.description: SAP HANA or HANA Cloud SQL host name.

user.title: HANA User
user.description: Technical HANA database user for Claude Code.

password.title: HANA Password
password.description: Password for the HANA technical user.

default_schema.title: Default Schema
default_schema.description: Default schema used when skills omit schema_name.

instance_number.title: Instance Number
instance_number.description: Optional two-digit HANA instance number for MDC landscapes.

database_name.title: Database Name
database_name.description: Optional tenant database name for MDC tenant connections.

ssl.title: Use SSL
ssl.description: true or false. true is typical for HANA Cloud.

validate_cert.title: Validate Certificate
validate_cert.description: true or false. Leave true unless you have a known self-signed lab setup.

max_result_rows.title: Max Result Rows
max_result_rows.description: Server-side per-page cap for query results, for example 50.

semantics_path.title: Semantics File Path
semantics_path.description: Optional local JSON file path for curated table and column meanings.

semantics_url.title: Semantics URL
semantics_url.description: Optional HTTPS URL for the same semantics JSON shape.

metadata_catalog_database.title: Metadata Catalog Database
metadata_catalog_database.description: Optional MDC catalog database name used by metadata tools when tables live in another tenant.

write_mode.title: Write Mode
write_mode.description: deny, ask, or allow. ask is the safest write-capable default.

work_schema.title: Work Schema
work_schema.description: Recommended schema for feature tables, staging tables, and PAL outputs. Skills and hooks refer to this value.
